error_signature: webhook triggering repeatedly due to no response
title: Webhook triggering repeatedly without response
symptom: The workflow keeps executing failed executions repeatedly without any error message. This happens because the webhook does not send a response back to the external service.
applies_when: Webhook is at the end of the workflow
not_this_if: Webhook is configured to send responses correctly
No external service is triggering the webhook
root_cause: When a webhook node is placed at the end of a workflow and an error occurs in a previous node, the workflow fails to send a response back to the external service. This leads the external service to continuously trigger the webhook, thinking it has not received a response.
fix_steps: Move the 'respond to webhook' node immediately after the webhook trigger node
Ensure that the workflow sends a response back even if there are errors in previous nodes
Test the workflow to confirm that the external service receives the response
agent_instruction: Rearrange the workflow to place the 'respond to webhook' node right after the webhook trigger.
